resource.name: DirectAssignedStopped
resource.object: Change directly when stop, use assigned items

resource.name: PendingAssignedStopped
resource.object: Start pending when stop, use assigned items

resource.name: CreateLotAndInput
resource.object: Create new lot and link lots

resource.name: CreateSSCC
resource.object: Could not create SSCC, prefix may be invalid

resource.name: HasOrder
resource.object: Unit is assigned to an order

resource.name: InStack
resource.object: Unit is assigned to a stack

resource.name: OnPallet
resource.object: Unit is assigned to a pallet

resource.name: InContainer
resource.object: Unit is assigned to a container

resource.name: InShipment
resource.object: Unit is assigned to a shipment

resource.name: OrderNotFound
resource.object: Order could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: MaterialNotFound
resource.object: Material could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: OperationLoad
resource.object: Operation could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: CollectionStatus
resource.object: Collection status does not allow operation

resource.name: NotInStack
resource.object: Unit is not in a stack

resource.name: NotOnPallet
resource.object: Unit is not on a pallet

resource.name: NotInContainer
resource.object: Unit is not in a container

resource.name: NotInShipment
resource.object: Unit is not in a shipment

resource.name: NotInventory
resource.object: Specified process unit is not an inventory

resource.name: UnitStatus
resource.object: Unit status does not allow operation

resource.name: LoadSite
resource.object: Site information could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: LoadCompany
resource.object: Company information could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: HasPacks
resource.object: Cannot perform operation because collection has packs

resource.name: HasStacks
resource.object: Cannot perform operation because collection has stacks

resource.name: HasPallets
resource.object: Cannot perform operation because collection has pallets

resource.name: HasContainers
resource.object: Cannot perform operation because collection has containers

resource.name: FailOperation
resource.object: Operation was explicitly made to fail

resource.name: InPack
resource.object: Unit is already in a pack

resource.name: NotInPack
resource.object: Unit is not in a pack

resource.name: PackStatus
resource.object: Pack status does not allow operation

resource.name: OrderType
resource.object: Invalid type of order for operation

resource.name: MatchContext
resource.object: Process unit status does not allow operation

resource.name: TransactionConfig
resource.object: Transaction system not configured for operation

resource.name: ItemLoad
resource.object: Item record could not be loaded

resource.name: ItemInsert
resource.object: Item record could not be inserted

resource.name: ItemUpdate
resource.object: Item record could not be updated

resource.name: ItemRType
resource.object: Item record type does not allow operation

resource.name: PackLoad
resource.object: Pack record could not be loaded

resource.name: PackInsert
resource.object: Pack record could not be inserted

resource.name: PackUpdate
resource.object: Pack record could not be updated

resource.name: PackRType
resource.object: Pack record type does not allow operation

resource.name: CollectionLoad
resource.object: Collection record could not be loaded

resource.name: CollectionInsert
resource.object: Collection record could not be inserted

resource.name: CollectionUpdate
resource.object: Collection record could not be updated

resource.name: CollectionRType
resource.object: Collection record type does not allow operation

resource.name: CollectionUnitType
resource.object: Type of units in collection does not allow operation

resource.name: NotInOrder
resource.object: Unit is not assigned to an order

resource.name: OrderLoad
resource.object: Order information could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: OrderLineLoad
resource.object: Order line information could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: OrderStatus
resource.object: Order status does not allow operation

resource.name: OrderLineStatus
resource.object: Order line status does not allow operation

resource.name: ProcessUnit
resource.object: Process unit for operation could not be created

resource.name: CustomOpInfoMissing
resource.object: Parts of custom operation info missing

resource.name: CustomOpXmlMissing
resource.object: XML definition of custom opereation missing

resource.name: ConvertedInventory
resource.object: Converted collection is on inventory not matching the pack inventory

resource.name: ConvertedOrder
resource.object: Converted collection is on order not matching the pack order

resource.name: NotProperty
resource.object: The given name is not a property name

resource.name: QcHold
resource.object: Unit is being held for QC

resource.name: PoStatus
resource.object: Purchase order status does not allow operation

resource.name: InvalidPartialAmount
resource.object: The unit cannot be modified with the specified amout

resource.name: NoPoLine
resource.object: No PO line matches the specified product

resource.name: StartStockTake
resource.object: Stock take could not be started, one may be active already

resource.name: StockTakeMethod
resource.object: Inventory stock take method does not allow operation

resource.name: StockTakeUnitLoad
resource.object: Invalid stock take information for a unit

resource.name: StockTakeUnitType
resource.object: Stock take is not set up for this type of unit

resource.name: StockTakeStatus
resource.object: Stock take status does not allow operation

resource.name: LogRecordExecuted
resource.object: Log record has already been executed

resource.name: InventoryType
resource.object: Type of inventory does not allow operation

resource.name: CodeNotFound
resource.object: An object with the specified code was not found

resource.name: InvalidMessageFields
resource.object: The field setup for the message is invalid

resource.name: NotInBom
resource.object: The specified product is not in the BOM

resource.name: NoBomRType
resource.object: ">No BOM record type has been specified

resource.name: PrunitBom
resource.object: The process unit does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: LotBom
resource.object: The lot does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: ProductionLotBom
resource.object: The production lot does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: PartialAdjust
resource.object: The contens of a partial pack cannot be adjusted

resource.name: IndividualLoad
resource.object: Individual record could not be not loaded

resource.name: PalletNotReserved
resource.object: Pallet is not reserved for order

resource.name: Station
resource.object: Station for operation could not be created

resource.name: StartStocktakeLocationActive
resource.object: Can't start a stocktake on inventory since a counting is active on a location

resource.name: StartStocktakeInventoryActive
resource.object: Can't start a stocktake on a location since a counting is active on the inventory.

resource.name: NoSupplier
resource.object: No PO or PO with no supplier specified

resource.name: HasPo
resource.object: Unit is already assigned to a PO

resource.name: PlotStatus
resource.object: Plot status does not allow operation

resource.name: NotInSourceBom
resource.object: The specified product is not in the source BOM

resource.name: NotInDestinationBom
resource.object: The specified product is not in the destination BOM

resource.name: SourcePrunitBom
resource.object: The source process unit does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: DestinationPrunitBom
resource.object: The destination process unit does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: SourceLotBom
resource.object: The source lot does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: DestinationLotBom
resource.object: The destination lot does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: SourceProductionLotBom
resource.object: The source production lot does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: DestinationProductionLotBom
resource.object: The destination production lot does not have the required BOM information

resource.name: NotMatchingOrderShipment
resource.object: Shipment not matching the order shipment

resource.name: OrderMismatch
resource.object: Pack and collection's order do not match

resource.name: POrderMismatch
resource.object: Pack and collection's production order do not match

resource.name: ItemCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: Number of items to create is higher than maximum allowed for this system

resource.name: PackCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: Number of packs to create is higher than maximum allowed for this system

resource.name: StackCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: Number of stacks to create is higher than maximum allowed for this system

resource.name: PalletCreateCountTooHigh
resource.object: Number of pallets to create is higher than maximum allowed for this system

resource.name: LotQaMarkMismatch
resource.object: Unit's QA mark does not match with the lot's QA mark

resource.name: InvalidPalletInventoryStatus
resource.object: The operation doesn't allow current pallets inventory status

resource.name: InvalidPackInventoryStatus
resource.object: The operation doesn't allow current packs inventory status

resource.name: AlreadyLockedOnQueue
resource.object: Unit already locked on the queue

resource.name: NotFoundOnQueue
resource.object: Unit not found on the queue

resource.name: InvalidPackLotCount
resource.object: Lot count details does not match with pack create count

resource.name: HasPOrder
resource.object: Unit is assigned to a production order

resource.name: SourcePackagingProcessUnit
resource.object: Source packaging process unit not found

resource.name: InvalidUnitOrder
resource.object: Unit is not on correct order

resource.name: LoadRecord
resource.object: Process unit record could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: LoadCompany
resource.object: Site company record could not be loaded from the database

resource.name: RemoteException
resource.object: Unspecified exception thrown by remote object

resource.name: RemoteFailed
resource.object: Remoting operation failed with exception other than ProcessUnitException

resource.name: PrunitNotFound
resource.object: The process unit was not found

resource.name: LoadLine
resource.object: A line's sub-process unit records could not be loaded

resource.name: LoadTemplate
resource.object: Activity template could not be loaded

resource.name: LotCreateRuleMia
resource.object: Specific lot create rule not found

resource.name: NoDefaultLotCreateRule
resource.object: No default lot create rule found

resource.name: TooManyDefaultRules
resource.object: More than one default lot create rule found

resource.name: MissingLot
resource.object: The process unit does not have a configured lot in lot based traceability

resource.name: AmountNotAvailable
resource.object: Requested amount of supplies is not available

resource.name: NotOnStockDescription
resource.object: Items that are not on stock

resource.name: NotOnStockDescription
resource.object: Packs that are not on stock

resource.name: NotOnStockDescription
resource.object: Collections that are not on stock

resource.name: NoOrderLines
resource.object: No matching order lines in production plan {0:Plan}

resource.name: NoProcessUnitClient
resource.object: Failed to get process unit client ({1:Data.Prunit})

resource.name: FormatFailed
resource.object: Failed to get error message for error code: {0:ErrorCode}

resource.name: InactivateOrders.Description
resource.object: Inactivates orders and delete entries in respective prunit-order connection tables.

resource.name: InactivatePos.Description
resource.object: Inactivates pos and delete entries in respective prunit-pos connection tables

resource.name: InactivateLots.Description
resource.object: Inactivates lots and delete entries in respective prunit-lots connection tables

resource.name: DeleteControlRecipes.Description
resource.object: Deletes control recipes and their data. Removes id value from controlrecipe column in proc_orders
